en: Increase passive income amount. Members get richer and give the church more offerings
zh_CN: 增加一点点被动收入。信徒变得更加慷慨，并向教会献上更多供奉。

en: Increase passive income amount. Members get much richer and give the church more offerings
zh_CN: 增加被动收入。信众们变得非常富有，被奉上的金钱明显增多。

en: Increase passive member gain amount. The members start inviting others to join the cult.
zh_CN: 教众开始通过口头传播来吸引更多迷途羔羊。

en: Increase passive member gain amount. The members thrive to get more people into the cult.
zh_CN: 教团的话语更加蛊惑人心，越来越多的人主动加入信仰。

en: Increase culting power. The cult gain more members everytime you press "Get Member"
zh_CN: 你的说辞更具说服力。每次招募都能带来更多信徒。

en: Increase culting power. The cult gain much more members everytime you press "Get Member"
zh_CN: 强化感召力。每次点击“招募信徒”时，会有非常多平民加入教会。

en: Increase culting power. The cult gain enormous amount of members everytime you press "Get Member"
zh_CN: 你的话语近乎神谕，人群疯狂地涌入教团。

en: Increase sacrificing power. The cult gain more money through sacrificing.
zh_CN: 小幅提升献祭效率。通过献祭过程从信徒身上榨取更多力量。

en: Increase sacrificing power. The cult gain much more money through sacrificing.
zh_CN: 血液被视为珍贵的贡品，献祭的回报显著提升。

en: Increase sacrificing power. The cult gain enormous amount of money through sacrificing.
zh_CN:
大幅提升献祭效率，黄金之血开始流淌。
每次献祭都带来巨大的力量

en: Increase action count. Do more actions at once.
zh_CN: 提升一点点行动效率。允许同时多一项教务工作。

en: Increase action count. Do two more actions at once.
zh_CN: 提升行动效率。允许同时进行多项教务工作。

en: Increase church efficiency. The church can have more members.
zh_CN: 圣堂被重新规划，现在可以容纳更多信徒。

en: Increase church efficiency. The church can have much more members.
zh_CN: 圣堂被重新规划，现在可以容纳更多信徒。

en: Decrease church purchase price. The cult finds a legal loophole to get cheaper labor and resources to build cheaper churches.
zh_CN: 小幅降低建筑成本。利用法律漏洞获取廉价劳动力。

en: Decrease church purchase price. The cult finds a legal loophole to get much cheaper labor and resources to build cheaper churches.
zh_CN: 大幅降低建筑成本。利用法律漏洞获取廉价劳动力和基建资源。

en: Increase sacrifice amount. Sacrifice more people at once.
zh_CN: 祭坛变得更加贪婪，一次献祭可以处理更多人。

en: Increase sacrifice amount. Sacrifice more people at once.
zh_CN: 祭坛吞噬更多生命，献祭规模进一步扩大。

en: Increase passive income speed. The members give money more often, because YOU force them to.
zh_CN: 信徒更频繁地献上供奉，金币获取速度提升。

en: Increase passive income speed. The members give money much more often, because YOU force them to.
zh_CN: 供奉变得更加频繁，金钱流入明显加快。

en: Increase passive member gain speed. The members become faster in inviting more people into the cult.
zh_CN: 混乱在城市中蔓延，越来越多的人投向教团。

en: Increase church building speed. Apparently whipping the laborers make them work faster.
zh_CN: 提升圣殿建造速度。事实证明，鞭笞能显著提高工人们的积极性。

en: Increase church building speed. Apparently threatening to kill the children of the laborers make them work much faster.
zh_CN: 提升圣殿建造速度。通过威胁工人的家属，施工进度得到了质的飞跃。

en: Increase culting speed. The action speed of getting members becomes faster.
zh_CN: 提升招募效率。招募信徒的准备时间缩短。

en: Increase culting speed. The action speed of getting members becomes much faster.
zh_CN: 提升很多招募效率。招募信徒的准备时间大大大大的缩短。

en: Increase sacrificing speed. The action speed of sacrificing becomes faster.
zh_CN: 加快献祭速度，不管白猫黑猫只要献祭了都是好猫

en: Increase sacrificing speed. The action speed of sacrificing becomes a lot faster.
zh_CN: 献祭过程更加简化，打倒一切反对组织接近信仰的敌人

en: Fleet Footed I
zh_CN: 疾步 I

en: Fleet Footed II
zh_CN: 疾步 II

en: Increase character move speed. Your cultists and visitors cross the church faster.
zh_CN: 提升角色移动速度。教徒和访客会更快地穿过教堂。

en: Increase character move speed even more. Nobody lingers when the cult has work to do.
zh_CN: 进一步提升角色移动速度。教团一声令下，没人会再慢吞吞地走路。

en: Soft Words I
zh_CN: 巧言 I

en: Soft Words II
zh_CN: 巧言 II

en: Increase trust gained per click. Outsiders are easier to sway with each interaction.
zh_CN: 提升每次点击获得的信任值。每次接触都更容易动摇局外人。

en: Increase trust gained per click even more. A few words now do the work of a sermon.
zh_CN: 进一步提升每次点击获得的信任值。几句低语就能顶上一整场布道。

en:
A patrol car has been idling outside your gates for nights.
Provide a gift to the station to keep them moving.
zh_CN: 一辆警车已经在正门外徘徊了数个夜晚。向警局提供一笔“治安捐款”以确保他们尽职地离开。

en:
A new recruit is crying for their family.
Dedicate enough resources to 're-educate' them before their doubts infect the rest of the flock.
zh_CN: 一名新招募的信徒在思念家人。在其质疑情绪感染他人之前，将其送入“再教育室”进行净化。

en:
A local reporter is sniffing around the compound.
Distribute 'charity' and provide a staged tour to ensure her story is favorable to the Cause.
zh_CN: 一名当地记者在据点周围窥探。通过“慈善捐赠”和一场安排好的参观，引导其发表对教会正面的报道。

en:
The City Council is asking questions about your midnight rituals.
Provide a 'donation' to their private fund to buy their silence and official immunity.
zh_CN: 市议会对你们的午夜仪式表示关注。向其私人账户汇入一笔“专项资金”，以换取行政默许与豁免。

en:
A nearby church is stealing your potential converts.
Donate to the community and pressure the leaders to run the competition out of town.
zh_CN: 附近的一座教堂正在抢走本该加入你教团的信徒。向社区捐赠一些钱，并施压当地领袖，把竞争者赶出这座城。

en:
The revenue service is questioning your 'Religious Tax Exemption.'
Prove your devotion with a massive donation to the state to keep your assets hidden.
zh_CN: 税务局正在质疑教会的“宗教免税资格”。向国家缴纳巨额献金以证明你的虔诚，并隐藏你的资产。

en:
Alignment complete. File 'Existence Termination' forms and submit final tribute.
Your duties to reality are concluded. Thank you for your compliance.
zh_CN: 行政校准已完成。请提交“存在终止”申请表并上缴最后的生物贡品。你对该现实的义务已履行完毕。感谢您的配合。
